# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

admin:
  access_log_path: /var/log/envoy/admin.log
  stats_silo_name: envoy

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: inbound_http
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: api-gateway
              domains:
              - '*'
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: '/api'
                route:
                  cluster: backend-cluster
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.router

  clusters:
  - name: backend-cluster
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: logical_dns
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: backend-cluster
      lds:
        hosts:
        - host: 'backend-service:8080'
          socket_address:
            address: '127.0.0.1'
            port_value: 9999

  - name: root-frontend-cluster
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: logical_dns
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: root-frontend-cluster
      lds:
        hosts:
        - host: 'root-service:8080'
          socket_address:
            address: '127.0.0.1'
            port_value: 9998

  - name: dashboard-frontend-cluster
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: logical_dns
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: dashboard-frontend-cluster
      lds:
        hosts:
        - host: 'dashboard-service:8080'
          socket_address:
            address: '127.0.0.1'
            port_value: 9997

  service:
    cluster_manager:
      cluster_discovery_interval: 10s

http_filters:
- name: envoy.http_connection_manager
  typed_config:
    '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
    stat_prefix: inbound_http
    route_config:
      name: local_route
      virtual_hosts:
      - name: api-gateway
        domains:
        - '*'
        routes:
        - match:
            prefix: '/api'
          route:
            cluster: backend-cluster

    http_filters:
    - name: envoy.router

typed_extension_protocol_options:
  google_proto2: {}

stream_manager_bundle:
  enabled: true
